title: antirrhinum vexillocalyculatum subsp. breweri
intro: Antirrhinum vexillocalyculatum subsp. breweri is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as the snapdragon. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and calming the nervous system. Herbal preparations of Antirrhinum vexillocalyculatum subsp. breweri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
